roles.title: U.S. Talent Investor, Senior Associate
roles.description: Support founders throughout their journey from initial meeting to exit. Identify exceptional individuals, advise founders on forming teams and ideas, and facilitate fundraising with investors during the LAUNCH phase. Develop personal network of investors and specialists.

roles.title: Paris Talent Investor, Senior Associate
roles.description: Talent Investor role based in Paris. Support founders from ideation through exit, identify exceptional talent, advise on cofounding and idea validation, and build investor networks.

roles.title: London Talent Investor, Analyst
roles.description: Talent Investor role in London. Work with founders at the earliest stage, identify exceptional individuals, advise on team formation and ideas, and build networks of investors and advisors.
